name: pp-web-sdk
description: Modular web SDK for analytics, attribution, login detection, event tracking, and more

scripts.test:e2e: pnpm run build && rm -rf dist/fixtures && cp -r e2e/fixtures dist/fixtures && npx playwright test
scripts.test:e2e:headed: pnpm run build && rm -rf dist/fixtures && cp -r e2e/fixtures dist/fixtures && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:live: pnpm run build && rm -rf dist/fixtures && cp -r e2e/fixtures dist/fixtures && npx playwright test e2e/braze-live.spec.ts
